judge_reason: Description A mentions a handwritten note reading 'PERS FILES' and a red stamped date, while Description B mentions completely different stamps ('BY COURIER SVC.', 'PERK FILES', 'RECORDED-32'), with the only overlap being the date stamp which is described as being at different locations (bottom vs. bottom left) and both describe different overall visual elements.
